PCM.Settings.BackendUrl.Name: Campaign Manager API URL
PCM.Settings.BackendUrl.Hint: Base HTTPS URL of the Pendragon Campaign Manager FastAPI service.
PCM.Settings.CampaignId.Name: Campaign ID
PCM.Settings.CampaignId.Hint: Database campaign UUID associated with this Foundry world.
PCM.Settings.ApiKey.Name: Campaign Manager API Key
PCM.Settings.ApiKey.Hint: Stored only in this GM browser. It is not synchronized to players or other Gamemasters.
PCM.Config.Title: Pendragon Campaign Manager
PCM.Config.Hint: Connect this world to the persistent campaign backend.
PCM.Config.SecurityHint: Only Gamemasters can open this configuration. Each GM browser must configure its own API key.
PCM.Config.CreateCampaignHint: Creates a campaign in the persistent backend and immediately selects it for this world.
PCM.Config.CampaignSlugHint: Optional. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens; leave blank to generate it from the name.
PCM.Config.CampaignNameRequired: Enter a campaign name that can produce a valid slug.
